title: IPZ-380 Criminal ● Kaori Maeda, a female teacher who is too beautiful
overview: A happy teaching life that I dreamed of! At that time, I never even thought that my daily life would be so fragile and easily crumbled ...! !! Kaori, a beautiful teacher who continues to be violated over and over again as a victim of the distorted affection of her students! The assault drama of a sad beautiful female teacher who became a sacrifice of distorted libido! This is a story of a beautiful teacher who was betrayed by both students and the school organization.
